name: Fresh company with HQ location for wizard tests
description: Fresh react_sdk_demo company decorated with a single HQ location (filing + mailing). Used by every company-onboarding spec that drives the wizard from an empty starting state: canary suite, basic onboarding specs, deep onboarding, step navigation, and bank-account empty-state. Cannot be combined with onboarded scenarios — those are based on react_sdk_demo_company_onboarded which has already completed onboarding.
